extra.reason: Fixed post-session web errors from Reanimated dependency arrays and keep-awake teardown race.
Completed live English translation setting, protocol support, transcript rendering, and tests.
Feedback examples now use target-language corrections, vocabulary, and lesson-plan phrases; whitespace-only user turns return low-score feedback instead of failing.
Voice session input now sends a one-time Bidi text instruction asking the agent to open the roleplay before streaming microphone audio.
